intro: Ornithogalum schoenlandii, commonly known as the "Star of the Veld," is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in African medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The bioactive constituents of Ornithogalum schoenlandii include alkaloids, glycosides, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal effects.
